zh.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley於1167年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Maurice FitzRobert48歲，母親Alice Berkeley35歲。他於1217年與Joan de Somery結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1243年11月29日在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭布里斯托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley于1167年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Maurice FitzRobert48岁，母亲Alice Berkeley35岁。他于1217年与Joan de Somery结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1243年11月29日在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰布里斯托。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley was born in 1167, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Maurice FitzRobert, was 48 and his mother, Alice Berkeley, was 35. He married Joan de Somery in 1217. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 29 November 1243, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Bristol, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, E: Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley est né en 1167, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Maurice FitzRobert, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice Berkeley, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Somery en 1217. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 novembre 1243, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Bristol, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, E: Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley 1167 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maurice FitzRobert 48 und seine Mutter Alice Berkeley 35. Er hat 1217 Joan de Somery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 29. November 1243 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Bristol, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley è nato il nel 1167 nel Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Maurice FitzRobert, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Alice Berkeley, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Somery nel 1217. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 novembre 1243, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Bristol, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Bristol St Augustine, Gloucestershire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 오구스틴
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley(이)가 1167년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maurice FitzRobert(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Berkeley(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1217년 Joan de Somery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1243년 11월 29일 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 브리스톨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley nasceu em 1167, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Maurice FitzRobert, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice Berkeley, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Somery em 1217. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de novembro de 1243, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Bristol, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Berkeley 4th Lord Of Berkeley родился в 1167 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Maurice FitzRobert было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Berkeley, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Somery в 1217 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 ноября 1243 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joan de Somery en 1217. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de noviembre de 1243, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Bristol, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
